text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
All the fans were cheering for me and had big
smiles on their faces!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It was almost like the stands were a garden full of
blooming flowers!
choice_data_list: It's because your running was amazing!
Let's make them bloom next time, too!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Heehee. I'm happy to have made you proud,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm counting on you to help me keep up with my
training so that I can repeat that kind of
performance!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Right! I'll do my best to bring joy to everyone!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
All right, I've got to get back into my training
starting tomorrow!
